Malik, DLA and Shri Praveen Srivastava, DLA in the Department of Legal Affairs, Ministry of Law and Justice as competent authority, for the purposes of the said rules in relation to notaries to be appointed by the Central Government. [F. No. N-15011/34/2019-DLA (N)] ZOYA HADKE, Addl.
